subject: A massive organic Eldrazi structure or creature — a great spiky maw or pit — with small Eldrazi drones clinging to its surface against a blue sky
description: The image is dominated by a vast dark brown-red organic mass filling most of the frame — a concave, spiky surface suggesting either the exterior of a colossal Eldrazi body or the opening of a massive biological pit or sinkhole. Three small, alien-limbed Eldrazi drone figures cling to the surface near the upper right, their teal and magenta coloration contrasting with the mass below. Bright blue sky occupies the upper portion of the frame behind them. The perspective is extreme — looking up at the mass from below — which amplifies the sense of being swallowed or consumed. The flavor text's "What will not yield will be consumed" fits the visual register precisely.
foreground: vast dark organic Eldrazi surface, concave and spiky, filling most of the frame
background: blue sky, small Eldrazi drone figures clinging to the surface
